original_question:
The minimum value of the function $f(x)= \sqrt {2}\sin x(\cos x+\sin x)- \frac { \sqrt {2}}{2}$ in the interval $\[0, \frac {π}{2}\]$ is _____ .

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
